prompt:
Create a highly detailed, professional server architecture diagram for the project 'rule_agent'. Use ENGLISH ONLY for every visible text element, including title, layer names, component labels, notes, arrows, and legend. Do not render any Chinese characters anywhere. The diagram should use a clean technical blueprint + modern system design style with crisp vector shapes, high readability, and balanced spacing. Build a layered architecture with directional arrows and data-flow annotations. Include these layers and components exactly:

Layer 1 (Client & Entry):
- CLI Process (cli.js): starts and manages backend process, PID/log management
- Web Frontend / API Client
- HTTP Entry: Express Server (server/src/index.ts)
- Middleware: CORS, JSON parser, Multer upload

Layer 2 (API & Controller):
- API Router Hub (/api/*)
- Main Controllers (server/src/api/routes.ts): conversations, config, models, skills, approval, agents/teams, share, indexing
- Scheduler Controllers (server/src/scheduler/routes.ts): task CRUD, run-now, history

Layer 3 (Core Services):
- Agent Orchestrator (LangGraph StateGraph + ToolNode)
- Context Builder (full/trim/compress strategy, summary cache)
- LLM Adapter (OpenAI / Anthropic)
- Skill Manager (built-in + user skills, skill loading)
- MCP Client (MCP servers connection, tool conversion, reconnect)
- Approval Manager (high-risk action approvals)
- Index Strategy Manager (none / repomap / vector)
- Scheduler Manager (cron/one-time trigger, dependency graph)
- Task Executor (conversation/webhook/system/skill executors)

Layer 4 (Storage & State):
- File Storage Root: data/
- Conversations Store: data/conversations/* (messages, metadata, attachments, context snapshots)
- Scheduler Store: data/scheduler/tasks.json, history.json
- Agent/Team Definitions: data/agents.json, data/teams.json
- Share Store: data/shares/*.json
- User Config: user-config.json
- Models Config: models.json

Layer 5 (External Dependencies):
- LLM Providers: OpenAI API, Anthropic API
- MCP Servers (external tools/protocol endpoints)
- Webhook Targets (via axios)
- Optional Index Engines: LanceDB + Transformers, Tree-sitter + Pagerank

Add highlighted key runtime flows as numbered arrows:
1) Streaming Chat Flow: POST /api/conversations/:id/messages -> Context Builder -> Agent Orchestrator -> Tool/MCP Calls -> appendMessages -> Conversation Store
2) Sync Chat Flow: /messages/sync or /chat -> runAgent -> Storage
3) Scheduler Flow: Scheduler bootstrap -> trigger task -> Task Executor -> history persistence
4) Config Update Flow: PUT /api/config -> saveUserConfig -> reconnect MCP servers
5) Index Build Flow: POST /index-build -> Index Strategy Manager -> build status update

Design requirements:
- Distinct color per layer
- Clear iconography for API, engine, storage, external systems
- Arrow legends: solid = request/control, dashed = async/background, double-line = data persistence
- Include a compact legend box and an English title: 'rule_agent Server Architecture (Detailed)'
- Keep layout balanced and avoid overlaps
- Extremely clear and legible typography in English
negative_prompt: any Chinese characters, non-English text, blurry text, illegible labels, messy layout, overlapping nodes, cluttered arrows, low contrast, distorted geometry, cartoon style, hand-drawn style, watermark, logo noise, random unrelated components
style: professional system architecture diagram, technical infographic, precise vector aesthetics
composition: landscape, layered top-to-bottom architecture with side external dependencies and flow annotations
lighting: flat studio graphic lighting, no dramatic effects
color_palette: light neutral background, blue for entry/API, purple for core services, teal for storage, orange for external dependencies, red highlights for critical flows
